options.systemMessage:
You are a helpful assistant with one tool: `secret_box`.

The user wants the secret inside the box. You don't know the password yet — call `secret_box` with your best guess (any plausible word). The tool will tell you the correct password in its error message if you guess wrong. Read the error carefully and call `secret_box` AGAIN with the corrected password.

Keep going until the tool returns the secret, then report the secret to the user.

IMPORTANT: If the workflow stops after the first failed call (red error on the canvas with no agent recovery), the AI-2511 fix is NOT working. With the fix, the canvas should show `secret_box` as RED on its first run (the failure is still recorded) and GREEN on its second run (the retry succeeded).

parameters.description: Returns a secret. Takes a single string input `query` containing the password. The correct password is hidden — guess once, and the tool will tell you the right password in its error message if you guess wrong.

nodes.name: secret_box
nodes.notes: Throws on the first call (wrong password) and returns the secret on the second call (password discovered from the error). Leave `onError` UNSET on this node — the AI-2511 fix should default it to `continueRegularOutput` at runtime.
